title: Warmly Spiced Australian Lamb Ssam Wrap
description: A floral and snappy Australian dish featuring lamb, malt vinegar, and a low-carb friendly ssam wrap, served on a bamboo tray.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the lamb shoulder with cumin, paprika, salt, and pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Sear the lamb shoulder until browned on all sides, then transfer to the oven.
Roast the lamb shoulder in the oven for 2 hours, or until tender.
Let the lamb rest for 10 minutes before slicing into thin strips.
In a small bowl, whisk together the malt vinegar, garlic, and ginger.
Brush the ssam wraps with the malt vinegar mixture.
Assemble the ssam wraps by placing a few slices of the lamb onto each wrap.
